memory.summary: I have an afternoon free, but the project feels overwhelming. Maybe I should just hang out with my friends instead of stressing over this.
Since there's no new info, I'll just skip the project and hang out with my friends to keep things chill.

goals.rationale: My priority is maintaining close bonds with friends (cohort_3) without friction. Staying home right now prevents me from feeling like a burden, which aligns with my high affiliation value and avoidant conflict style.
